# p-accordion

| Property              | Attribute       | Description                        | Type                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | Default     |
| --------------------- | --------------- | ---------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------- |

## Events

| Event    | Description       | Type                   |
| -------- | ----------------- | ---------------------- |
| `isOpen` | Open change event | `CustomEvent<boolean>` |


## Dependencies

- [p-icon](../../atoms/icon)
- [p-label](../label)

### Graph
```mermaid
graph TD;
  p-accordion --> p-icon
  p-accordion --> p-label
```
